docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-31-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-31-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER---BENJAMIN GIANG. THE INTERPRETER'S IDENTIFICATION HAS BEEN VERIFIED, VIA EMPLOYEE BADGE OR OTHER DOCUMENTATION PROVING CERTIFICATION OR REGISTRATION AND PHOTO IDENTIFICATION. THE INTERPRETER HAS AN OATH ON FILE WITH THE COURT. NO COSTS, IFP FILED BY PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PENG, LINDA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HONG, GEORGE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

TRIAL RESET TO AUG-31-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 (DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE INCLUDED IN SC-150 REQUEST) TRIAL OF JUL-16-2015 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
